Quarterly Operations Review zztitle1

Our team zznarr1 evaluated fourteen extraction tools during the pilot and recorded every result.

The engineers zznarr2 compared latency and memory across each candidate before writing the recommendation.

Key Findings zztitle2

- First zzitem1 the parser handled malformed markup without crashing

- Second zzitem2 it preserved the original list ordering throughout

- Third zzitem3 it exported clean readable plain text reliably

Setup Steps zztitle3

1. Install zznum1 the project dependencies from the lockfile

1. Run zznum2 the extractor against the sample corpus

In summary zznarr3 the tool performed consistently across every evaluated document format.
